channel.title: Posts on wil oc ward | university of sheffield
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on wil oc ward | university of sheffield

item.title: Machine Learning and International Rural Water Supply
item.description: Machine learning on images from the Unlocking the Potential of Groundwater for the Poor project. This page contains details of the proposed MSc project. The data are provided by the British Geological Survey (BGS), who will be involved in supporting the project. A number of images have been provided of hand pumps in use in sub-Saharan Africa, some of which are in good working order, and others which have failed.
